_doc: The fixed 7-model catalog (ADR-0005/0009/0022) — the SINGLE machine-readable source for gateway
slugs and their families. scripts/_lib.sh parses it (keep each slug+family pair on ONE line; no jq),
profiles bind roles from it, and verify-coherence.sh checks the AGENTS.md §1 table against it.
A version bump edits THIS file in the SAME commit as its ADR (Failure Mode #3 / ADR-0005/0007).
